=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/missingEffectError.ts(9,14): error TS2322: Type 'Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB, never>' is not assignable to type 'Effect<number, never, never>'.
/.src/missingEffectError.ts(9,14): error TS377003: Missing errors ErrorA | ErrorB in the expected Effect type. effect(missingEffectError)
/.src/missingEffectError.ts(12,14): error TS2322: Type 'Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB, never>' is not assignable to type 'Effect<number, ErrorA, never>'.
/.src/missingEffectError.ts(12,14): error TS377003: Missing errors ErrorB in the expected Effect type. effect(missingEffectError)


==== /.src/missingEffectError.ts (4 errors) ====
    import { Effect, Data } from "effect"
    
    class ErrorA extends Data.TaggedError("ErrorA")<{ message: string }> {}
    class ErrorB extends Data.TaggedError("ErrorB")<{ code: number }> {}
    
    declare const effectWithErrors: Effect.Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB>
    
    // Should trigger missingEffectError - assigning Effect with errors to Effect<number> (no errors)
    export const missingAllErrors: Effect.Effect<number> = effectWithErrors
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB, never>' is not assignable to type 'Effect<number, never, never>'.
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377003: Missing errors ErrorA | ErrorB in the expected Effect type. effect(missingEffectError)
    
    // Should trigger missingEffectError - missing ErrorB
    export const missingErrorB: Effect.Effect<number, ErrorA> = effectWithErrors
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB, never>' is not assignable to type 'Effect<number, ErrorA, never>'.
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377003: Missing errors ErrorB in the expected Effect type. effect(missingEffectError)
    
    // Should NOT trigger - errors match
    export const errorsMatch: Effect.Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB> = effectWithErrors
    
    // Should NOT trigger - no errors in source
    declare const effectNoErrors: Effect.Effect<number>
    export const noSourceErrors: Effect.Effect<number> = effectNoErrors
